## Summary
Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation
- [ ] `PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/pytest -q`
- [ ] Manual smoke test completed (if applicable)

## Checklist
- [ ] Docs updated (README/release notes/other) if needed
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
- [ ] Linked issue(s), if applicable

## Notes for reviewers
Anything that needs extra attention.
